metadata.source: AmeriHealth Caritas NC 2026 Formulary (manual override — CMS MR-PUF PA signal degraded by multi-carrier record bundling)
metadata.override_reason: CMS MR-PUF records for HIOS 17414 / NC show PA=False for Ozempic at 55.6% rate (1,690 of 3,034 records) due to multi-carrier record bundling where shared formulary entries include non-PA sister plans. AmeriHealth published formulary confirms PA=True for all GLP-1 agonists including semaglutide/Ozempic. This enrichment file applies the correct PA=True signal. Tier=preferred-brand sourced from AmeriHealth NC formulary documentation.
metadata.parse_notes: Minimal enrichment targeting Ozempic/semaglutide dosage forms. PA, QL, ST sourced from AmeriHealth Caritas NC 2026 published formulary. Tier placement: Preferred Brand (Tier 2 in AmeriHealth 4-tier system).
